strengths: ≤10 results enforced both via maxResults param and a defensive re-slice in formatResults (webSearch.ts:47), so it caps even if Tavily over-returns
Error classification is case-insensitive and ordered exactly per spec (rate-limit → auth → network → unknown) in classifyError (webSearch.ts:15-24)
ENV_VAR_MISSING short-circuits before constructing the Tavily client (webSearch.ts:111-118); API key never leaks into ToolResult
execute() wraps searchWithRetry in an outer try/catch so it can never throw out (webSearch.ts:107-128)
API_ERROR correctly excluded from isRetryable (webSearch.ts:26-28) so auth failures are not retried
All 7 tests pass; tests mock @tavily/core with no network access; named constants (MAX_RESULTS, SNIPPET_MAX, MAX_ATTEMPTS, BACKOFF_MS) avoid magic numbers

issues.description: tavily({ apiKey }) client is reconstructed inside the retry loop on every attempt rather than once before the loop. Trivial config-object construction; no correctness or meaningful performance impact.
